items.name: Marie-Claude B.
items.text: After months fighting bed bugs with traditional methods, Haloo-Ween solved the problem in one visit. No odor, no chemicals. My kids slept peacefully that very night.

items.name: Jean-François L.
items.text: We called them before moving into a 4½. The apartment was spotless when we arrived. The technician was professional and punctual. 100% recommend.

items.name: Sylvie M., Director
items.text: We have an annual contract with Haloo-Ween for our senior residence. Treatments are discreet, odor-free, and chemical-free — perfect for our residents. A team we trust.

items.q: Is dry steam really effective against all species?
items.a: Yes. Dry steam at 375°F instantly destroys all living organisms — larvae, adults, eggs — regardless of species (bed bugs, cockroaches, ants, mites). The intense heat penetrates cracks and fabrics that pesticides cannot reach.

items.q: Do we need to leave the home during treatment?
items.a: No. Unlike chemical pesticides, dry steam leaves no toxic residue. You can re-enter treated rooms immediately after the technician's visit.

items.q: How long does a treatment take?
items.a: On average 2 to 4 hours depending on the size and infestation level. Our technician will give you a precise estimate during the initial inspection.

items.q: Is there a guarantee on results?
items.a: Yes. Our packages include a free follow-up visit to confirm complete elimination. If insects are still present, we return at no extra charge.
We cover Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, and the North Shore. Contact us to confirm availability in your area.

methode_page.title: Our Method
methode_page.subtitle: The science behind 375°F dry steam
methode_page.intro: Dry steam pest control is the most effective and safe method available today. Here's why.

why.title: Why 375°F?
why.desc: At 375°F (190°C), dry steam instantly destroys all living organisms — larvae, adults, eggs. No insect can survive this temperature. Chemical pesticides, on the other hand, do not affect eggs.

dry.title: Why 'dry'?
dry.desc: Unlike ordinary steam, dry steam contains less than 5% moisture. It penetrates fabrics, cracks, and porous surfaces without wetting them, with no risk of mold.

safe.title: Safe for your family
safe.desc: No chemicals, no residue. After treatment, rooms are immediately usable. Safe for children, seniors, pets, and allergy sufferers.
